[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000101 3
1 11011010 5
2 10000111 4
3 11111001 6
4 11001011 5
5 10000101 3
6 11011010 5
7 00101100 3

01 10 10000010 2
12 21 10000000 1
23 32 00101100 3 match 7

45 54 11110110 6
56 65 11111100 6
67 76 10110010 4
70 07 11001001 4

13 31 10101100 4

35 53 10101001 4

60 06 01111011 6
71 17 01001011 4

36 63 01010101 4

72 27 11001011 5 match 4
